summary: Terms page successfully implements the diner aesthetic with correct palette, typography, and layout. The cream-colored article card (#fff8ea) on teal background (#9fd8d2) follows brand guidelines. All required content elements are present including the back link, Terms of Service heading with black weight, effective date, section headings, and support contact. The layout uses appropriate containers and spacing for legal content readability.

violations.description: The legal article card uses light shadow treatment instead of the documented shadow-sm for legal longform content, though this is within acceptable variance for the legal route exception

actions: Verify shadow treatment matches the documented shadow-sm specification for legal longform articles
Confirm support email link functionality matches canonical support mailbox contract
